input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.6.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.6.4.1
            TITLE: all tractive system connections must:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.6.4.1: All Tractive System connections must:
EV.6.4.1 All Tractive System connections must: 
a. Be designed to use intentional current paths through conductors designed for electrical 
current  
b. Not rely on steel bolts to be the primary conductor 
c. Not include compressible material such as plastic in the stack-up

final_answer: All Tractive System connections must: a. Be designed to use intentional current paths through conductors designed for electrical current b. Not rely on steel bolts to be the primary conductor c. Not include compressible material such as plastic in the stack-up
